goal: Align the generated real-adapter CUDA handoff with the new bundle archive metadata guard so operators know local closeout requires a metadata-bearing archive.
head: 2e7fca8
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the CUDA handoff generator so generated handoff artifacts explicitly describe the required metadata-bearing evidence bundle archive, plus focused tests and current NOT_GO regenerated artifacts.
required_evidence: Generated CUDA handoff JSON includes a bundle_archive_contract with required metadata files and closeout failure behavior.
Generated markdown and shell handoff explicitly tell operators the copied archive must be metadata-bearing and produced by build_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py.
Focused handoff tests cover the archive metadata contract in JSON/Markdown/Shell.
Current v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
No release GO is claimed from current local artifacts.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate only aligns operator handoff text/metadata with existing closeout enforcement; it does not create release evidence.

phase_notes.plan: Add bundle archive metadata contract fields and operator text to the generated CUDA handoff.
phase_notes.audit: Closeout now rejects archives without build_real_adapter_evidence_bundle metadata, but generated handoff text only says to copy the tarball and run closeout.
phase_notes.build: Patch build_real_adapter_handoff.py and focused tests, then regenerate current NOT_GO handoff artifacts through the existing recertification runner.
phase_notes.check: Run focused handoff tests, current NOT_GO recertification, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this handoff alignment phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Generated CUDA handoff archive metadata contract, focused handoff tests, regenerated current NOT_GO handoff artifacts, WORKING state, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
